title: Resolve short Restic backup summary IDs safely
goal: Make the Cabinet Restic handoff compatible with Restic 0.12.1 backup summaries that emit a shortened snapshot ID, while preserving exact full-ID restore binding and preventing any second backup or ambiguous restore.

approval.note: Authorizes only a reviewed Cabinet code, test and documentation change for safe Restic short-ID resolution. It does not authorize a private backup, restore, retention, service or source-data effect.

acceptance.assertion: A shortened backup summary ID is resolved only by querying the unique precommitted tag and requiring exactly one full 64-character snapshot ID whose prefix matches the summary value.
A full 64-character backup summary ID remains accepted and is rebound to the same unique tagged snapshot before restore.
Missing, malformed, non-matching or ambiguous tag results stop before restore and report that a snapshot may exist; they never start a second backup or delete a snapshot.
Focused tests cover Restic 0.12.1 short IDs, full IDs, ambiguous/missing tag matches, prefix mismatch, exact restore and redacted error receipts.
A read-only or synthetic proof demonstrates the corrected resolution path without creating another private snapshot.

metadata.observed_error: restic_snapshot_id_missing after a successful Restic 0.12.1 backup created exactly one uniquely tagged snapshot

scope: modify scripts/private_cabinet_restic_handoff.py for safe shortened snapshot-id resolution
add deterministic focused tests and update documentation if necessary
publish and review one Cabinet pull request bound to this task
conditions: no real private backup or new Restic snapshot is created
no real private restore is executed
no service, retention, forget, prune, source-data or repository-runtime mutation occurs
live proof is read-only or synthetic
merge requires current-head diff review and green Cabinet CI

authorized_effects: code, tests and documentation changes for T018
read-only inspection of the already-created tagged snapshot metadata if needed
synthetic restore-command argument verification without private payload extraction
forbidden_effects: another private archive or Restic backup
restic forget, prune, retention or repository cleanup
service stop, start, restart or configuration mutation
publication of private tag, snapshot id, endpoint, credential path or private contents
